Title: {{ task.title }}

Category: {{ task.category }}

Due Date: {{ task.dueDate | date : "short" }}

Completed: {{ task.completed ? "Yes" : "No" }}

No tasks available.
  • {{ task.title }} - Category: {{ task.category }} - Completed: {{ task.completed ? "True" : "False" }}

    Title: {{ task.title }}

    Category: {{ task.category }}

    Completed: {{ task.completed ? "Yes" : "No" }}

// filteredTasks: Task[] = []; // categories: string[] = []; // selectedCategory: string | undefined; // sortField: string = 'dueDate'; // sortDirection: string = 'asc'; // constructor(private taskService: TaskService) {} // ngOnInit(): void { // this.loadTasks(); // } // loadTasks(): void { // this.taskService.getTasks().subscribe((tasks) => { // this.tasks = tasks; // this.filteredTasks = tasks; // this.categories = Array.from(new Set(tasks.map((task) => task.category))); // this.sortTasks(); // }); // } // deleteTask(taskId: number): void { // this.taskService.deleteTask(taskId).subscribe(() => { // this.loadTasks(); // }); // } // filterTasksByCategory(): void { // if (this.selectedCategory) { // this.filteredTasks = this.tasks.filter( // (task) => task.category === this.selectedCategory // ); // } else { // this.filteredTasks = this.tasks; // } // this.sortTasks(); // } // sortTasks(): void { // this.filteredTasks.sort((a, b) => { // const aValue = (a as any)[this.sortField]; // const bValue = (b as any)[this.sortField]; // if (aValue === bValue) { // return 0; // } // if (this.sortDirection === 'asc') { // return aValue < bValue ? -1 : 1; // } else { // return aValue > bValue ? -1 : 1; // } // }); // } // editTask(task: Task): void { // task.editing = true; // // Create a copy of the original task for editing // task.editedTask = { ...task }; // } // updateTask(task: Task): void { // const updatedTask = { // id: task.id, // title: task.editedTask?.title || '', // Use optional chaining to handle possible undefined // completed: task.editedTask?.completed || false, // category: task.editedTask?.category || '', // dueDate: task.editedTask?.dueDate || new Date(), // }; // this.taskService.updateTask(updatedTask).subscribe( // (response) => { // task.editing = false; // // Update the task details in the tasks array // const index = this.tasks.findIndex((t) => t.id === response.id); // if (index !== -1) { // this.tasks[index] = response; // } // }, // (error) => { // console.error('Error updating task:', error); // } // ); // } // cancelEdit(task: Task): void { // task.editing = false; // } // } // task-list.component.ts import { Component, OnInit } from '@angular/core'; import { Task } from 'src/app/models/Itask'; import { TaskService } from 'src/app/services/task.service'; @Component({ selector: 'app-task-list', templateUrl: './task-list.component.html', styleUrls: ['./task-list.component.css'], }) export class TaskListComponent implements OnInit { tasks: Task[] = []; filteredTasks: Task[] = []; categories: string[] = []; selectedCategory: string | undefined; sortField: string = 'dueDate'; sortDirection: string = 'asc'; constructor(private taskService: TaskService) {} ngOnInit(): void { this.loadTasks(); // Subscribe to changes in task data from TaskService this.taskService.taskData$.subscribe((taskData) => { if (taskData) { // Access taskData properties here and update your component's data console.log('Received task data:', taskData); // Example: this.updateDataBasedOnTaskData(taskData); } }); } loadTasks(): void { this.taskService.getTasks().subscribe((tasks) => { this.tasks = tasks; this.filteredTasks = tasks; this.categories = Array.from(new Set(tasks.map((task) => task.category))); this.sortTasks(); }); } deleteTask(taskId: number): void { this.taskService.deleteTask(taskId).subscribe(() => { this.loadTasks(); }); } filterTasksByCategory(): void { if (this.selectedCategory) { this.filteredTasks = this.tasks.filter( (task) => task.category === this.selectedCategory ); } else { this.filteredTasks = this.tasks; } this.sortTasks(); } sortTasks(): void { this.filteredTasks.sort((a, b) => { const aValue = (a as any)[this.sortField]; const bValue = (b as any)[this.sortField]; if (aValue === bValue) { return 0; } if (this.sortDirection === 'asc') { return aValue < bValue ? -1 : 1; } else { return aValue > bValue ? -1 : 1; } }); } editTask(task: Task): void { task.editing = true; // Create a copy of the original task for editing task.editedTask = { ...task }; } updateTask(task: any): void { const updatedTask = { id: task.id, title: task.editedTask.title, completed: task.editedTask.completed, category: task.editedTask.category, dueDate: task.editedTask.dueDate, // Add the dueDate property }; this.taskService.updateTask(updatedTask).subscribe( (response) => { task.editing = false; // Update the task details in the tasks array const index = this.tasks.findIndex((t) => t.id === response.id); if (index !== -1) { this.tasks[index] = response; } }, (error) => { console.error('Error updating task:', error); } ); } cancelEdit(task: any): void { task.editing = false; } }
